title: Okay, this unleashed my agent
summary: AI Jason reviews several autonomous agent systems and techniques including Autoresearch, AutoAgent, Claude Code's memory architecture, Hermes self-evolution, and Openclaw skill evolution. The video compares how these agents autonomously refine their behavior and knowledge.
